title: DVLA opening hours: Christmas and New Year 2025
body: "Customers will be able to use our online services throughout the Christmas and New Year period.     Date Contact centre opening times     Monday 22 December 8am to 7pm (normal hours)   Tuesday 23 December 8am to 7pm (normal hours)   Christmas Eve 24 December 8am to midday   Christmas Day 25 December closed   Boxing Day 26 December closed   Saturday 27 December 8am to 2pm (normal hours)   Monday 29 December 8am to 5:30pm   Tuesday 30 December 8am to 5:30pm   Wednesday 31 December 8am to 5:30pm   New Year’s Day 1 January 2026 closed   Friday 2 January 8am to 7pm (normal hours)   Saturday 3 January 8am to 2pm (normal hours)    "
